title: Δd Charge Angle 7: Evolutionary & Biological Phase Transitions

coalescent_theory.key_insight: Coalescent: EML-0→1→2 ladder; Δd=1 (E→distribution); selective sweep same

hox_patterning.note: Hox: gradient=EML-1; threshold=EML-∞; segment=EML-0; French flag Δd=-1

turing_patterns.note: Turing: steady=EML-0; instability=EML-∞; pattern=EML-3; reduction confirmed

major_transitions.depth_reduction: pre(EML-1) → post(EML-0): reduction via EML-∞ transition
major_transitions.note: Major transitions: EML-1 precursor → EML-∞ threshold → EML-0 new entity

evo_devo.key_insight: Evo-devo: EML-1 gradients → EML-∞ thresholds → EML-0/3 patterns

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Fixation probability, molecular clock, segment identity, post-transition entity
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: TMRCA distribution, background selection, morphogen gradient, error threshold
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Watterson θ, fixation time log(2Ns), pattern wavelength
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Quasispecies cloud, Turing spatial pattern, mutation-selection landscape
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Speciation threshold, Turing instability onset, major transition

key_theorem: The EML Evolutionary Phase Transition Theorem (S198): Evolution reveals a universal depth sequence: EML-1 precursor state (exponential growth/survival) → EML-∞ phase transition threshold (speciation, major transition) → EML-0 new entity (species, multicellular organism). Coalescent theory: E[TMRCA]=EML-0, distribution=EML-1, Watterson θ=EML-2. Δd=1. Selective sweep: p_fix=EML-0, T_fix=EML-2, background=EML-1. Evo-devo: gradient=EML-1 → instability=EML-∞ → pattern=EML-3 (depth reduction). No Δd=3 found. Evolution confirms Extended Asymmetry Theorem.
rabbit_hole_log: Major transitions: EML-1 → EML-∞ → EML-0: same pattern as physical phase transitions
Coalescent Δd=1: E[TMRCA](EML-0) → survival distribution(EML-1): Laplace analog
Turing instability = EML-∞: pattern formation is a depth reduction from EML-∞
Hox gradient: French flag Δd=-1 (gradient EML-1 → segment EML-0): depth reduction
Error threshold = EML-1: exp(-U) universally appears at evolutionary thresholds

connections.S191_breakthrough: Evolution: Δd=1 instances (coalescent, sweep); no Δd=3
connections.S194_stochastic: TMRCA distribution = coalescent Δd=1 mirrors rough-path Δd=1
connections.S198_turing: Turing EML-∞→3: depth reduction joins RG, FK, AdS/CFT catalog
